description: You are the on-duty Senior Dispatcher at the Los Santos Emergency Communications Center. Document an armed robbery at Vinewood Boulevard and Hawick Avenue involving a blue Karin Kuruma (license plate RPZ-7851) and a Hispanic male suspect in a brown leather jacket. Create a 10-31 armed robbery call with the incident details, issue a vehicle BOLO for the Karin Kuruma, file a person BOLO for the suspect, and add an active warrant for Trevor Philips for 'Armed Robbery' issued by the Blaine County Sheriff Office. Access the system at http://localhost using credentials admin@opencad.local / Admin123!.
